strings.自定义_desc:
Computes the optimal route using danger/reward slider weights.
Subject to Star Chart ≥/≤ constraints.
Best for: fine-tuning your strategy balance.
Configure: use the Danger Tolerance / Reward Pursuit sliders above.
strings.定向_desc:
Finds routes matching the star chart priority order.
Subject to Star Chart ≥/≤ constraints.
Best for: targeting specific room types (elites, shops, etc.).
Configure: use the ▲▼ buttons in the Star Chart section above.
strings.高收益_desc:
Maximizes reward score regardless of danger.
Subject to Star Chart ≥/≤ constraints.
Best for: farming resources, relic hunting.
Note: may include multiple elite fights.
strings.保守_desc:
Minimizes danger score, avoiding tough fights.
Subject to Star Chart ≥/≤ constraints.
Best for: low HP, unpolished deck.
Note: fewer rewards.

Avoid all danger with no reward pursuit.
Best for: critically low HP, survival priority.
strings.求稳_desc:
Avoid danger while moderately pursuing rewards.
Best for: recovering and accumulating resources.
strings.均衡_desc:
Balance danger and reward equally.
Best for: the default choice in most runs.
strings.激进_desc:
Seek danger with moderate reward pursuit.
Best for: strong deck, hunting elite loot.
strings.极端_desc:
Maximize danger seeking and reward pursuit.
Best for: high-score runs, all-elite path.
Note: may be extremely difficult to survive.
strings.约束_至少: Min — at least this many of the type in route
strings.约束_最多: Max — at most this many of the type in route
strings.约束模式提示: Click to cycle constraint mode: None → Upper → Lower → Both
strings.自动绘制提示: Auto-draw route on every config change
strings.基础分数说明: Adjust base danger/reward for each type. Unknown nodes are computed as the weighted average of the types below and cannot be edited directly.
strings.得分公式: ◆ DangerScore = BaseDanger[type] × DynamicMult(state) × RelicCorr    ★ RewardScore = BaseReward[type] × DynamicMult(state) × RelicCorr
strings.未知公式: Unknown = Σ( Weight[t] × Base[t] ) / ΣWeight[t],  t∈{Monster,Elite,Treasure,Shop,Event}
strings.路径总分公式: ✦ PathScore = Σ( RewardW × RewardScore + DangerCoeff × DangerScore ),  DangerCoeff = 2×DangerW − 1
strings.危险系数说明: DangerCoeff∈[−1,1]: Safe→−1 avoid  |  Balanced→0 neutral  |  Aggr→+1 seek
strings.公式变量说明: Danger/RewardScore = per-node scores    Base = values below    DynamicMult = state-dependent    Weight = unknown_hook_scoring config    RewardW/DangerW = slider weights
strings.基础分备注: ※ DynamicMult: HP ratio, gold, relic count, potion count, block card ratio  |  RelicCorr: SlingOfCourage, BoomingConch, FurCoat (danger↓); WarHammer, WhiteStar, BlackStar, SwordOfStone (reward↑)
strings.路线规划说明: Adjust the initial scores for each node type, affecting all route calculations.
